title: Analyses
description: The Analyses module lets you design and run population-level effect estimation, patient-level prediction, incidence rate calculations, treatment pathway analyses, characterizations, and more. Each analysis type is configured against a cohort and data source.
tips: Start by selecting an analysis type from the tabs: Characterization, Incidence Rates, Treatment Pathways, Estimation, Prediction, SCCS, or Evidence Synthesis.
Most analyses require at least one target cohort and a data source to be defined first.
Use the stats bar at the top to see counts across all analysis types.
Estimation analyses compare outcomes between target and comparator cohorts using propensity score methods.
Prediction analyses use machine learning to predict patient-level outcomes.
